scripts.build:web: cd ../../web && npm install && npm run generate && mkdir -p ../desktop/tauri/src-tauri/public ../desktop/tauri/dist ../desktop/tauri/src-tauri/icons ../desktop/tauri/src-tauri/data ../desktop/tauri/src-tauri/config && rsync -a --delete .output/public/ ../desktop/tauri/src-tauri/public/ && rsync -a --delete .output/public/ ../desktop/tauri/dist/ && cp public/favicon.svg ../desktop/tauri/src-tauri/icons/favicon.svg && [ -f ../data/noise.db ] || (mkdir -p ../data && : > ../data/noise.db) && cp ../data/noise.db ../desktop/tauri/src-tauri/data/noise.db && rsync -a ../config/ ../desktop/tauri/src-tauri/config/
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build:web && node scripts/gen-icons.mjs && npx @tauri-apps/cli@latest build
